disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Breathlessness has progressed slowly over years and then deteriorated sharply over the past 48 hours to breathlessness at rest
trigger_question_examples: How long has the breathlessness been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been slowly building over years, but the last two days it's got so much worse — now I can't catch my breath even sitting still.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Orthopnoea — breathlessness worse lying flat, sleeps propped on several pillows
trigger_question_examples: Is it worse when you lie down?
How many pillows do you sleep on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't lie flat at all — it feels like I'm drowning. I've got about four pillows stacked up so I can breathe.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Coughed up pink, blood-tinged sputum tonight after a coughing fit
trigger_question_examples: What came up when you coughed?
Have you coughed up any blood?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: After a coughing fit tonight I brought up some pink, blood-tinged spit — that's never happened before and it scared us.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New sensation of a rapid, irregular heartbeat over the last few days
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed your heart racing or beating irregularly?
Does your pulse feel like it's fluttering or skipping?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — the last few days my heart's been racing and fluttering, like it's all over the place.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Currently unable to complete a full sentence without stopping to breathe
trigger_question_examples: Can you finish a sentence in one breath?
How hard are you having to work to breathe right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I have to... stop... after a few words... to catch my breath.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: History of rheumatic fever in childhood and recurrent severe childhood sore throats
trigger_question_examples: Any heart problems or serious illnesses growing up?
Were you ever told you had rheumatic fever?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had rheumatic fever as a child, and a lot of bad throat infections back then.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe generalised fatigue over recent days
trigger_question_examples: Have you been more tired than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been completely washed out, no energy at all these last few days.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever and no green/yellow purulent sputum
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers or chills?
Is the phlegm coloured, like green or yellow?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers, and the spit isn't green or yellow — it was just pink tonight.

trigger_question_examples: Have your ankles or legs been swelling?
Have you noticed any puffiness in your feet or ankles?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My ankles have been a bit puffy lately.
